issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for missing environment variables or network failures.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap TypeScript Hardhat project with ERC20 tests
scenarios.rationale: Baseline installs bare hardhat and writes generic ethers tests; treatment installs @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox, uses loadFixture for snapshot/revert, revertedWithCustomError for ERC20 errors, and runs --gas-report/coverage.

scenarios.name: Deploy contract to Sepolia and verify on Etherscan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers deploy script but omits verification configuration; treatment configures networks.sepolia + etherscan.apiKey via env vars and runs npx hardhat verify --network sepolia as the skill prescribes.
